steps.title: Track the research question
steps.content: The passage begins by saying it was unclear what effects forested stream banks have on stream biodiversity. It then presents Santoso's study comparing forested and nonforested streams in an Indonesian oil palm plantation. The findings answer that uncertainty by reporting higher species richness in forested streams and explaining a possible role for leaf litter.

steps.title: Reject invented purposes
steps.content: A invents a debate about agricultural yields. B invents a comparison among stream-protection strategies. C overstates the predator detail as a challenged prior view about fish behavior. The answer is D.
